acceptance_criteria.title: Search input is present on search page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the search page
When the page loads
Then I should see a search input

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a keyword shows matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that matches post content
Then I should see matching posts in the results

acceptance_criteria.title: No results message shown when no matches
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that matches nothing
Then I should see a no results message

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of trending tags

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows suggested users
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see suggested users to follow

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows popular posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see popular posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the post list
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page with trending tags visible
When I click a tag chip
Then the tag should appear highlighted as active

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed displays posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Post card shows author handle
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I look at a post card
Then I should see the author's handle

acceptance_criteria.title: Post card links to thread detail
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I see a post
Then I should see a link to the post's detail page

acceptance_criteria.title: Load More button is visible when posts remain
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When the page loads with more posts than the initial page size
Then I should see a Load More button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking Load More shows additional posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed with a Load More button visible
When I click Load More
Then more posts should appear in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button exists on post cards
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I view a post card
Then I should see a like button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking like marks post as liked
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the like button on a post
Then the post should be marked as liked

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button exists on post cards
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I view a post card
Then I should see a bookmark button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking bookmark marks post as bookmarked
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the post should be marked as bookmarked

acceptance_criteria.title: Post composer is visible on home feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a post composer

acceptance_criteria.title: Submit button disabled when textarea is empty
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed with the composer visible
When the textarea is empty
Then the submit button should be disabled

acceptance_criteria.title: Submitting a post adds it to the feed
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I type content in the composer and click submit
Then the new post should appear in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows post content
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I should see the post content

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail shows replies when they exist
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that has replies
When the page loads
Then I should see the replies section

title: See meta banner on every page

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see the demo meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner contains link to spec
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing the meta banner
When I look for links
Then I should see a link to view the spec

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on explore page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see the demo meta banner

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button is visible in the nav
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When the page loads
Then I should see a theme toggle button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking theme toggle changes the theme
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page
When I click the theme toggle
Then the page theme should change

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows display name
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile
When the page loads
Then I should see the user's display name

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user handle
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile
When the page loads
Then I should see the user's handle

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user bio
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile
When the page loads
Then I should see the user's bio

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile
When the page loads
Then I should see the user's posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button is visible on profile page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile
When the page loads
Then I should see a follow button

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking follow changes button to unfollow
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a user profile that I am not following
When I click the follow button
Then the button should change to indicate I am following

title: View parent post context in thread

acceptance_criteria.title: Thread detail shows parent post when reply
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that is a reply
When the page loads
Then I should see the parent post above the focal post

title: Like a post from the thread detail page

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button exists on thread detail
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I should see a like button for the focal post

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking like on thread detail marks post as liked
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on a post detail page
When I click the like button
Then the post should be marked as liked
